name: Quinoa Vegetable Jambalaya (Hl)
recipeIngredient: 1 green bell pepper, seeded and diced
1 medium zucchini, halved and cut into 1/2 inch slanted slices
Tobasco sauce or other hot sauce - to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the quinoa and 2 1/2 cups water in a medium saucepan. Bring to a simmer and cover.
2. Cook over low heat for 15 to 20 minutes, until all of the water is absorbed.
3. In a large saucepan, heat the oil. Add the green pepper, onion, zucchini, eggplant, mushrooms, celery, and garlic.
4. Cook, stirring, over medium heat for 8 to 10 minutes.
5. Stir in the crushed tomatoes, 1/4 cup water, and seasonings.
6. Cook over low heat for 15 to 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. When ready to serve, fold in the cooked quinoa and cook for 5 minutes more over low heat, stirring frequently.
8. Pass Tobasco sauce at the table.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
Nutritional Information: 350 calories and 7 grams of fat (Courtesy of "Vegetarian Times Vegetarian Entertaining")
